title: astragalus ovinus
intro: Astragalus ovinus, also known as Ovine milk vetch or Astragalus, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus ovinus is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
